article_meta.title: Crisis Leadership: Using Technology To Maintain Stability And GrowthByPhil Portman,Forbes Councils Member.for

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral language, attributes evaluative claims to the author, avoids adopting the article’s promotional framing, and represents the single-perspective nature of the source accurately.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs; when highlighting emphasis, it attributes it to the author (e.g., ‘emphasized,’ ‘presented as’).
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Claims about effectiveness of technology are framed as the author’s position, not asserted as fact.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Subjective judgments are consistently attributed to the author’s perspective.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No dramatic or alarmist phrasing; tone is measured.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or disparaging language.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No assumptions about intentions beyond what the author states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Only one perspective exists in the source; summary reflects that without overstating certainty.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Captures the key concepts (VUCAP, tech tools, author’s background) present in the article.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Any potentially evaluative terms are explicitly attributed to the author.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Politically and ideologically neutral vocabulary throughout.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Balanced; no undue emphasis on threats beyond the article’s content.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats the author’s viewpoint as an opinion, not elevating it unduly.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Clearly more neutral than the source’s promotional framing; distancing language is used.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Accurately notes the single-source opinion nature of the piece in sources_represented.
